name: Mexicali Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Skinless Boneless Chicken Breasts, ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Mix all ingredients together except salsa in a bowl.
3. Shape the mixture into thirty balls, each about 1 inch in diameter.
4. Place the meatballs in an ungreased rectangular pan (13x9x2 inches) in a single layer.
5. Bake uncovered for about 15 minutes or until no longer pink in the center and drained.
- To serve immediately, place the meatballs and salsa in a 2-quart saucepan. Heat until hot, stirring occasionally, then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes or until the meatballs are heated through. Sprinkle with thinly sliced green onions if desired.
6. Allow the meatballs to cool completely before storing.
7. Store tightly sealed in a heavy-duty plastic food-storage bag or freezer container for up to 2 months.
- Nutritional information per meatball: Calories 27.1, Fat 0.8g, %CFF 25.8
- Note: Extra lean ground beef can be used, changing the nutritional analysis to Calories 45.2, Fat 3.1g, %CFF 62.4.
